modules.title: Fundamentals
modules.content: Information, data, data types, ADTs, static and dynamic data structures, implementation methods.

modules.title: Arrays
modules.content: Array as ADT, multidimensional arrays, structures, polynomial ADT, sparse matrix, lists using arrays.

modules.title: Linked Lists
modules.content: Singly, doubly, multi-linked lists; implementations; applications to polynomials, sparse matrix.

modules.title: Algorithm Design
modules.content: Divide & Conquer, Greedy, Dynamic Programming, Backtracking, Exhaustive Search, Probabilistic Algorithms.

modules.title: Analysis of Algorithms
modules.content: Big-O notation, sequential, iterative, recursive algorithms, program efficiency.

modules.title: Searching and Sorting
modules.content: Linear/Binary search; Insertion, Selection, Merge, Quick, Heap, Counting sort.

modules.title: Stacks and Queues
modules.content: ADT stack and queue, implementations, priority queue, applications.

modules.title: Trees
modules.content: Binary trees, BSTs, height-balanced trees, 2-3 trees, B-trees, applications.

modules.title: Graphs
modules.content: Graph representations, DFS, BFS, spanning trees (Kruskal, Prim), shortest paths.

modules.title: Hashing
modules.content: Hash functions, collisions, resolution strategies, applications.
